name: blazemeter.com
prose: # Blazemeter API Explorer API Live API Documentation ## Getting started The Blazemeter API Explorer API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://a.blazemeter.com/api/v4`. ## Authentication Authenticate by passing your API key in the `api_key` header on every request. ## API reference ### GET /user/active/sessions   Returns a single record. ### POST /user/active/terminate   ### GET /user/collections List organization multi-tests  Returns a single record. ### GET /user/invites   Returns a list of records. Sample response: ```json [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] ``` ### GET /user/locations Get user available locations  Returns a single record. ### GET /user/masters List user private masters  Returns a single record. ### POST /user/password Update user name  ### PUT /user/password Update user name  ### PATCH /user/password Update user name  ### GET /user/projects Get user projects  Returns a single record. ### GET /user/register Registration  Returns a single record. ### POST /user/register Registration  ### GET /user/tests List user private tests  Returns a single record. ### GET /user/top   Returns a list of records. Sample response: ```json [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] ```
